data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: The site leverages Microsoft's Azure cloud services to dynamically scale resources according to demand.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Usage of a global CDN to ensure fast content delivery and reduced latency for users worldwide.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: The site is built using a microservices architecture to enhance modularity and ease of deployment.

data.title: High-Availability Setup
data.description: Microsoft.com is designed with redundancy and failover clusters for high availability.
data.technical_spec: Azure Load Balancers, SQL Always On

data.title: Responsive Web Design
data.description: Adopts responsive web design techniques to ensure compatibility across a range of devices.
